mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (article_id, user_id, content, top_comment_id, parent_comment_id, deleted) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{topCommentId}, #{parentCommentId}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET content = #{content}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND parent_comment_id = 0 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND parent_comment_id = 0 AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM comment WHERE top_comment_id = #{topCommentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE top_comment_id = #{topCommentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
